features.description: Database, performance tuning, and API modularization
steps: Verify SQLite optimizations, Network/Load headers (gzip, Cache-Control), and Domain-Driven Handler dependency injection (cmd/server/main.go)

features.description: Optimizing long-running tasks and CLI benchmarks
steps: Verify CLI benchmarks, slow-query logging (SLOW_QUERY_THRESHOLD_MS), stress generation progress UI, and parallel execution (goroutines/errgroup)

features.description: Security posture and secrets management
steps: Verify security headers (CSP, HSTS, CSRF), track/scrub test artifacts from git history, and run secret scanner pre-commit gate

features.description: Manage user authentication flow and secure cookies
steps: Verify OAuth/Session cookie policies (SameSite=Lax/Strict) and cross-site OAuth callback validation

features.description: Global Theme Rollout & Design System Refinement to Earth theme
steps: Verify Earth theme palette (bg-earth/text-earth), typography (Inter/Playfair), and standard component styles across all pages

features.description: Refactoring modals and adding micro-animations
steps: Verify modal_base shell reusability, Dark Theme integration, and global micro-animations (hover:scale-105) across all modals

features.description: Admin panel features and styling
steps: Verify Bulk Upload functionality, Admin Users view, and Dark Theme rendering across the Admin Dashboard metrics/listings

features.description: Core application capabilities and user workflows
steps: Verify Claim Ownership workflow, Homepage Service listings, and Status Badge rendering across search/categories

features.description: Comprehensive test metric improvements and testing tools
steps: Verify CLI testing harness (api-spec, cli-drift validations), baseline test coverage (>90%), and module-specific coverage targets across the codebase
Verify os.Exit(1) calls in gate.go, set_phase.go, and status.go are replaced with proper RunE error returns to enable unit testing error paths (Completed)

features.description: Reducing duplication and streamlining API handlers
steps: Verify Pagination Standardization
Verify standard ErrorResponse JSON structure on 400 Error
Verify Response Helpers (Pending): Check for usage of `RenderSuccess`, `JSONSuccess`, and `ErrorResponse` handlers across controllers
Verify Base Handler Struct (Pending): Review handler method signatures to confirm they use a base struct to eliminate session parsing duplication
Verify Service Layer Consolidation (Pending): Inspect service layer structures and ensure validation middleware runs consistently
Verify Route Grouping (Completed): Inspect code and ensure auth-required routes are fully separated from public routes via grouped middleware

features.description: Verified all public, user, and admin routes are accessible and functional via the UI
steps: Verify successful navigation of Public (Home/About/Search), User (Profile/Create), Admin routes, and client form backend URL normalizer validations

features.description: Continuous integration, vulnerability scanning, and build workflows
steps: Verify Tailwind CLI compilation (no CDN), GitHub Actions pipeline (govulncheck, docker scout), and Fly.io deployment config validation

features.description: Refactoring features into dedicated services and domain packages
steps: Verify refactored ImageService, domain-level Hours of Operation string parsing, decoupled AuthMiddleware, and strict date parsing workflows

features.description: Features and architectural improvements planned for the next phase
steps: Verify Apple/Facebook Platforms (Pending): Click on 'Apple' and 'Facebook' login buttons in the identity section and configure dev accounts
Verify DevLogin Hardening (Pending): Ensure hitting the DevLogin route in a prod-like condition executes the real claim workflow instead of a skip mechanism
Verify Admin Customization (Pending): Navigate to Admin settings and inject a custom dashboard color or font, then confirm the page updates dynamically
Verify Expiration Ticker (Pending): Confirm that the background service correctly tags listings older than their configured TTL config as 'expired'
Verify Location Filter (Pending): Perform a map-based search query like `?filterLocation=City` and assert that the returned result list matches accurately
Verify Browser Integration Test (Pending): Trigger the browser integration test suite and verify 'Create Listing' finishes flawlessly start to end
Verify Security Hardening (Pending): Identify dependencies utilizing alpine:latest and ensure that CVE-2025-60876 patches are updated
Verify Fat Handler Structs (Pending): Use structural tag libraries rather than custom parsing to validate object bindings

features.description: Comprehensive security audit fixes and defense-in-depth improvements
steps: Verify ADMIN_CODE logic, Admin Login rate limits, Content-Security-Policy compliance (no inline scripts), HTMX bindings (`hx-on`), and local asset hosting

features.description: Comprehensive mapping of application routes and workflows for all user personas
steps: Verify Visitor, Authenticated User, and Admin comprehensive journeys, and local DB CLI tool maintenance integration

features.description: Refactor all scripts in the scripts/ directory to output structured JSON for robust agent consumption
steps: Verify script outputs (harness, drift check, CI gates, tests, utils) conform to standard JSON envelope contracts

features.description: Reduce token footprint of agent context by breaking monolithic specs and documentation into granular files.
steps: Verify monolithic specs (OpenAPI, BRAND_GUIDELINES, CLI commands) are successfully extracted into granular modular files (Completed)
Verify codebase documentation (AGENTS.md, Feature Workflows) is fully modularized into granular rules under `.agent/rules/` and `.agent/workflows/` (Completed)
Verify feature-implementation workflows (refactor.md) enforce proactive Code Smell evaluation, safe continuous refactoring loops, and strict test preservation (Completed)
Verify Context Cost Math: Implement CalculateContextCost and RMS mathematical logic  (Completed)
Verify Context Cost Tests: Implement unit tests in internal/agent/cost_test.go covering whitelist/blacklist file filtering and correct RMS output  (Completed)
Verify Context Cost CLI: Integrate harness cost command into cmd/harness/main.go  (Completed)
Verify Context Cost Execution: Run harness cost command and validate terminal output aesthetic  (Completed)

features.description: Implemented category-specific featured listings with a max limit of 3, persisting across pagination
steps: Added a failing test to verify featured prioritization on page 2.
Removed `page == 1` restriction in `HandleHome` and `HandleFragment`.
Verify ListingStore GetFeaturedListings interface accepts category parameter
Verify SQLite GetFeaturedListings query filters by category and enforces LIMIT 3 constraint (Completed)
Verify Admin HandleToggleFeatured prevents featuring more than 3 items per category (Completed)
Verify listing HandleHome calls GetFeaturedListings correctly with empty category (Completed)
Verify listing HandleFragment passes category filter to GetFeaturedListings during HTMX pagination (Completed)
Verify mock repository implementations match the updated GetFeaturedListings signature (Completed)
Verify failing test implementation enforces admin max 3 featured listings constraint
Verify failing test implementation asserts category-specific featured persistence upon pagination
Verify listing HandleFragment passes category filter to GetFeaturedListings during HTMX pagination

features.description: Fixed Admin Featured Listings HTMX row swap turning into JSON
steps: Verify if MockImageService in TestHandleCreate_WithImage and TestListingHandler_Upload_Valid to resolve filesystem I/O errors during tests is still needed
Verify `HandleToggleFeatured` in `admin_listings.go` returns JSON natively.
Verify `setupAdminTestContext` mocking the renderer to expect an admin_listing_table_row. is necessary
Verify `admin_actions_test.go` explicitly verifies HTML is returned.
Verify Refactored `HandleToggleFeatured` returns `updatedListing` HTML upon successful save.
Verify Fixed jq JSON parsing bug in scripts/utils.sh when failures contain unescaped characters

features.description: Verified necessity of MockImageService in listing tests and removed it where possible.
steps: Replaced MockImageService with real LocalImageService using t.TempDir() in TestHandleCreate_WithImage to avoid I/O pollution.
Replaced MockImageService with real LocalImageService using t.TempDir() in TestListingHandler_Upload_Valid.
Removed unused testifyMock import from listing_upload_test.go.
Confirmed MockImageService is still needed in TestHandleCreate_ImageUploadError to simulate upload failures.
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_FullDriftReport for complete drift aggregation
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_EmptyFiles for minimal docs edge cases
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_MarkdownPathEdgeCases for path normalization
Implemented TestVerifyApiSpec_ExtractMarkdownRoutes_Direct for unit testing extraction logic
Verified all tests pass with GOCACHE/GOTMPDIR /tmp configuration
Passed all harness gates: red-test, api-spec, implementation, lint, coverage, browser-verification

features.description: Fix exploits and bypasses in the 10x Engineer CLI harness to ensure strict TDD adherence
steps: Verify JSON Casing Exploit: Modify state.json with uppercase keys and ensure LoadState rejects the invalid signature (Completed)
Verify Coverage Spoofing Exploit: Attempt to bypass coverage by modifying .agents/coverage-thresholds.json and ensure Harness catches it (Completed)
Verify Red-Test Bypass Exploit: Ensure 'gate red-test PASS' cannot be manually executed via CLI (Completed)
Verify Panic Evasion Exploit: Ensure tests that os.Exit(0) without outputting failure correctly trigger red-test failure (Completed)

features.description: Granular refactoring tasks to reduce the context cost of the top 10 most expensive files
steps: Verify monolithic test files (e.g., handler_test.go, sqlite_test.go, listing_write_test.go), frontend scripts (app.js), and CLI command definitions have been successfully extracted into modular, context-efficient files while maintaining test suite integrity (Completed)
Verify Interface Segregation (CQRS): Extract ListingStore into ListingReader and ListingWriter interfaces in internal/domain to eliminate sqlite_listing.go structural fragmentation

Verify Test Suite Isolation: Refactor residual large test files like sqlite_listing_test.go and listing_validation_test.go to use testify/suite or targeted sub-test groupings to further reduce context bloat

Verify Domain Map Documentation: Create a domain mapping reference in .agents/rules/ indicating where specific business validations (Create, Geocoding, Jobs) are physically located to prevent context discovery thrashing

steps: Verify normalizePath utility is extracted to a shared helper in internal/agent to eliminate duplication between drift.go and ast.go (Completed)

features.description: Fix parity gaps, redundancies, and reliability issues between GitHub Actions CI and local pre-commit pipeline.
steps: Verify coverage threshold path: Fix .agents/coverage-threshold in ci.yml to match pre-commit.sh (Completed)
Verify duplicate security-check removal: Remove `./scripts/security-check.sh &&` from git hook in scripts/setup-hooks.sh:43 since pre-commit.sh already runs security-check.sh (Completed)
Verify CI drift check parity: Add a new `drift_checks` job to ci.yml that runs `scripts/api-drift-check.sh` and `scripts/template-func-drift-check.sh` (Completed)
Verify CI coverage anti-degradation: Add a step in the ci.yml `test` job that checks `.agents/coverage-threshold` cannot be lowered (Completed)
Verify CI coverage artifact upload: Add `actions/upload-artifact@v4` step in ci.yml to upload `.tester/coverage/coverage.out` as a build artifact (Completed)
Verify golangci-lint expansion: Add `gosec` and `bodyclose` linters to `scripts/.golangci.yml` under linters.enable list (Completed)
Verify ci-local.sh rewrite: Replace `act` delegation in ci-local.sh with native execution of lint, test, coverage, and security checks (matching pre-commit.sh gates) (Completed)
Verify restart removal from pre-commit: Remove `verify_restart.sh` task from pre-commit.sh:203 and add it as a standalone workflow in `.agents/workflows/restart-server.md` (Completed)
Verify CI security job split: Split the monolithic `security` job in ci.yml into `security_static` (govulncheck + pattern checks) and `security_dynamic` (live server audit) jobs (Completed)
Verify GitHub Actions SHA pinning: Pin `actions/checkout`, `actions/setup-go`, and `actions/setup-node` in ci.yml to commit SHAs with version comments (Completed)
Verify CI test cache-busting: Add `-count=1` flag to `go test` in ci.yml:69 to match pre-commit.sh behavior and catch flaky tests (Completed)
